data.title: Talent Infinity Retracts Misleading Promotions After Regulator Review
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Talent Infinity Resource Developments, Inc. ( (TSE:TICO) ).

Talent Infinity Resource Developments has disclosed that a review by the British Columbia Securities Commission found certain promotional articles, produced via Nordcore Media and a third party, to be exaggerated, speculative, and potentially misleading about the company’s prospects. In response, the company has withdrawn the identified materials from circulation, is reviewing all investor communications for compliance with securities rules, and has pledged that future technical disclosures will be vetted by qualified professionals to ensure balanced, factual information for investors.

The firm clarified that it remains at an early exploration stage and is not yet in a position to claim mineral resources or imply high returns, distancing itself from past promotional language that suggested stronger positioning in critical minerals markets. By emphasizing its responsibility for all disclosure and committing to align with NI 43-101 standards, Talent Infinity is seeking to restore regulatory compliance and reinforce more cautious expectations among stakeholders about its current development status and future prospects.

Spark’s Take on TICO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TICO is a Underperform.

TSE:TICO currently faces significant financial and operational challenges, with zero revenue, substantial losses, and high financial leverage. Technical indicators are weak, and the lack of valuation metrics adds to the risk profile. However, recent corporate events, including executive changes and strategic advisories, provide a glimmer of potential improvement. Overall, the stock is high-risk with limited immediate upside potential.

To see Spark’s full report on TICO stock, click here.

More about Talent Infinity Resource Developments, Inc.

Talent Infinity Resource Developments Inc. is an early-stage mineral exploration developer based in Vancouver, focusing on evaluating and planning exploration of its properties rather than operating producing mines. The company is currently engaged in corporate development and has not yet defined any mineral resources, with no certainty that further work will lead to commercial production.

Average Trading Volume: 114,466

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$33.04M

data.title: Multistack to Exit Loss-Making Operations via Asset Sale to Hong Kong Buyer
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Multistack International Limited ( (AU:MSI) ) has shared an update.

Multistack International Limited has concluded that its current air conditioning business is no longer commercially viable, with operations remaining loss-making and requiring capital beyond the company’s capacity to raise. The board has resolved to discontinue the business in its present form and has identified Hong Kong-based Willing Y Limited, an exporter of air conditioning components from China seeking expansion into Australia and New Zealand, as the preferred acquirer of MSI’s assets and liabilities.

MSI and Willing Y Limited have reached an in-principle agreement under which WYL will acquire all MSI assets, including 100% of Multistack Australia Pty Ltd, and assume nearly all of MSI’s liabilities in lieu of a cash purchase price. Following completion, MSI expects to retain a small net asset position in cash to cover statutory and ASX obligations for about 12 months while it seeks a new business to inject into the listed entity, with the deal subject to definitive documentation, shareholder approval, an independent expert’s report, and other regulatory clearances, and targeted for completion by the end of June 2026.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:MSI) stock is a Sell with a A$0.01 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Multistack International Limited stock, see the AU:MSI Stock Forecast page.

More about Multistack International Limited

Multistack International Limited is an Australia-based company historically engaged in air conditioning-related operations through its wholly owned subsidiary, Multistack Australia Pty Ltd. Its activities have focused on supplying air conditioning equipment and components, serving customers in the Australian and New Zealand markets.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$408.9K

See more data about MSI stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Greenwing launches scoping study to advance San Jorge lithium brine project
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Greenwing Resources Ltd ( (AU:GW1) ) has issued an announcement.

Greenwing Resources has launched a scoping study and drill planning program at its San Jorge Lithium Brine Project in Argentina, appointing specialist firm Zelandez to lead work on development pathways, processing options and an initial economic framework. The move builds on a maiden mineral resource of 1.07 million tonnes of lithium carbonate equivalent and aims to upgrade the project from an early discovery to a clearly defined development opportunity.

The work will target extensions of the brine system to the west, north and at depth, where geophysics suggests a thick, largely untested brine body with rising lithium grades. By defining new drill holes and assessing broader landholdings, including potential water supply areas, Greenwing is seeking to grow both the size and grade of the resource and strengthen San Jorge’s role as a strategically significant standalone lithium supply asset.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:GW1) stock is a Sell with a A$0.05 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Greenwing Resources Ltd stock, see the AU:GW1 Stock Forecast page.

More about Greenwing Resources Ltd

Greenwing Resources Ltd is an Australian-listed resources company focused on lithium brine development in Argentina’s Lithium Triangle. Its flagship asset is the San Jorge Lithium Brine Project in Catamarca Province, where the company is advancing exploration and early-stage project definition to position itself as a potential future lithium producer serving growing battery and electric vehicle markets.

Average Trading Volume: 707,407

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$22.64M

data.title: Iondrive Sells South Korean Exploration Unit to Refocus on Metal Extraction Technology
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Southern Gold Limited ( (AU:ION) ) has issued an announcement.

Iondrive Limited has agreed to sell its 100%-owned South Korean mineral exploration business, Korea Metal Resources Limited, via the divestment of its Singaporean holding company for upfront cash consideration of A$332,903, with completion expected by 30 April 2026. The unnamed buyer, controlled by a major Toronto-listed gold producer, will also assume intercompany loans, and the final price will be adjusted for cash and receivables on completion.

The transaction will remove about A$600,000 in annual operating costs linked to the exploration operations, completing Iondrive’s transition away from its traditional exploration activities. Management says the move will allow the company to concentrate capital and management effort on commercialising its IONSolv™ metal extraction platform and advancing its strategy in modular urban mining technology for low-emission recovery of critical minerals from various waste streams.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:ION) stock is a Hold with a A$0.02 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Southern Gold Limited stock, see the AU:ION Stock Forecast page.

More about Southern Gold Limited

Iondrive Limited is an Australian technology company focused on developing IONSolv™, a proprietary metal extraction platform designed for the selective recovery of critical minerals. The low-temperature, closed-loop process avoids aggressive acids and targets applications in battery materials, broader mineral processing and ‘urban mining’ of e-waste, solar panels, batteries and other end-of-life technologies.

YTD Price Performance: -51.16%

Average Trading Volume: 2,736,933

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

data.title: Goldstream Unit Commits Up to US$8 Million as Cornerstone Investor in Manycore IPO
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Goldstream Investment Limited ( (HK:1328) ) has issued an announcement.

Goldstream Investment Limited’s wholly owned subsidiary Redwood has agreed to act as a cornerstone investor in the Hong Kong listing of Manycore, committing up to the Hong Kong dollar equivalent of US$8 million to subscribe for shares at the offer price under the international tranche. The deal, arranged alongside J.P. Morgan and CCBI as joint sponsors and coordinators, positions Goldstream to gain early exposure to Manycore’s IPO while expanding its portfolio of primary market investments.

The transaction qualifies as a discloseable transaction under Hong Kong listing rules because the relevant percentage ratios exceed 5% but remain below 25%, triggering reporting and announcement requirements without requiring shareholder approval. Completion of the investment remains conditional on certain listing-related conditions being satisfied or waived, and the company has cautioned shareholders and potential investors about the associated execution risk when dealing in its shares.

More about Goldstream Investment Limited

Goldstream Investment Limited, incorporated in the Cayman Islands and listed in Hong Kong, operates as an investment company. Through its wholly owned subsidiary Redwood, the group participates in capital markets transactions, taking positions in equity offerings to generate returns and diversify its investment portfolio.

Average Trading Volume: 77,758

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

CK Asset Holdings ( (HK:1113) ) has provided an update.

CK Asset Holdings has called an extraordinary general meeting for 27 April 2026, to be held in hybrid format in Hong Kong and online, to seek shareholder approval for a connected transaction involving the disposal of certain shareholdings and shareholder debt instruments under a previously announced share purchase agreement. The board is also asking investors to authorise directors to take all necessary actions and execute documents to complete and implement the disposal, with detailed arrangements set out for online participation, proxy voting, record dates and potential changes to venue or date in case of severe weather.

The meeting will be conducted by poll, and shareholders may attend physically or via a designated online platform, where they will be able to vote and submit questions in real time. The notice also clarifies procedures for proxy appointments, joint holders, and register closure, underscoring the company’s emphasis on formal shareholder approval and procedural flexibility as it advances this connected transaction.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1113) stock is a Buy with a HK$52.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on CK Asset Holdings stock, see the HK:1113 Stock Forecast page.

More about CK Asset Holdings

CK Asset Holdings Limited is a Hong Kong-listed property developer and investment company, incorporated in the Cayman Islands and traded under stock code 1113. The group is part of the wider CK conglomerate and is known for its portfolio of real estate and infrastructure-related assets spanning Hong Kong and international markets.

Commonwealth Bank of Australia ( (AU:CBA) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Commonwealth Bank of Australia has disclosed a minor change in director Katherine Neisha Howitt’s shareholding following participation in the bank’s Dividend Reinvestment Plan. Howitt’s direct holdings increased by three fully paid ordinary shares, while jointly held shares with Diggory William Howitt rose by 34, at an issue price of $174.47 per share.

The change, effective 30 March 2026 and notified to the ASX on 8 April 2026, reflects routine reinvestment of dividends rather than any active on-market trading. The bank confirmed there were no related changes in contractual interests and that the transactions did not occur during a closed period, indicating standard governance and disclosure practices for director holdings.

data.title: Torque Metals Extends High-Grade Gold at Paris Project Ahead of Resource Upgrade
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Torque Metals Ltd. ( (AU:TOR) ) has shared an announcement.

Torque Metals has reported significant new assay results from in-fill and extensional drilling at its Paris Gold Deposit, including very high-grade intercepts and confirmation of a multi-lode system extending up to 500 metres beyond the current mineral resource boundary. Additional high-grade results at the nearby HHH deposit, successful use of down-hole EM targeting, and a comprehensive review under a newly appointed management team underpin a multi-rig 2026 drilling campaign and an interim resource update expected in the June quarter, potentially enhancing the project’s scale and appeal to investors.

The latest drill program at Paris delivered thick, high-grade intersections within the PL1 and PL2 zones, while deeper drilling intersected mineralisation down-plunge, suggesting substantial growth potential beyond the existing 152,000oz resource. At HHH, drilling returned strong grades below its current 73,000oz resource, reinforcing the broader camp’s prospectivity and supporting Torque’s strategy to grow high-grade gold inventories and strengthen its position in the Kalgoorlie South gold district.

Down-hole EM surveys continue to be a powerful exploration tool at the Paris Gold Project, generating new conductive plates that are guiding step-out drilling and leading to fresh targets such as the Lady Doris area on a parallel structural corridor. With about 20,000 metres of drilling already completed, plans for a further 8,000 metres, and an upcoming resource update, stakeholders are watching for further confirmation that Paris and its satellite deposits can evolve into a materially larger high-grade gold system.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:TOR) stock is a Hold with a A$0.45 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Torque Metals Ltd. stock, see the AU:TOR Stock Forecast page.

More about Torque Metals Ltd.

Torque Metals Ltd. is an Australian gold exploration company focused on its 100%-owned Paris Gold Project in the Kalgoorlie South region of Western Australia. The company targets high-grade, multi-lode gold systems across a district-scale land package, with key deposits including the Paris and HHH resources, as it seeks to expand its mineral resource base through aggressive drilling programs.

Average Trading Volume: 2,892,288

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$257.8M

data.title: Flagship Minerals bolsters board and Chile team to advance Pantanillo gold project
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Pan Asia Metals Ltd. ( (AU:FLG) ) has provided an announcement.

Flagship Minerals has strengthened its leadership team with the appointment of Zhongyi (John) Zhang as a Non-Executive Director and Eduardo Cisternas Melendez as Principal Geologist for Chile. The company aims to bolster its technical and project development expertise as it advances the Pantanillo Gold Project in Chile’s Maricunga Gold Belt toward key development milestones.

Zhang, a senior representative and major shareholder of strategic partner Shandong Xinhai Mining Technology & Equipment Inc., brings extensive mining, mineral processing and EPC project experience, including exposure to machine learning and AI applications. His role is expected to enhance Flagship’s engineering-led development pathways, plant design and execution capabilities for Pantanillo.

Cisternas contributes more than two decades of geological and operational experience in Chilean mining, including 15 years with BHP at the Spence and Cerro Colorado mines in geology, geotechnical engineering and environmental geology. His in-country expertise is intended to support Flagship’s development studies and the eventual transition of Pantanillo from project stage toward production, reinforcing the company’s operational depth in Chile.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:FLG) stock is a Hold with a A$0.25 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Pan Asia Metals Ltd. stock, see the AU:FLG Stock Forecast page.

More about Pan Asia Metals Ltd.

Flagship Minerals Limited is an ASX-listed resources company focused on advancing the Pantanillo Gold Project in Chile’s Maricunga Gold Belt. The company is building technical, engineering and project development capabilities to progress this gold asset toward feasibility, construction and eventual production, targeting growth in a key South American mining jurisdiction.

EarlyPay Limited ( (AU:EPY) ) just unveiled an announcement.

EarlyPay Ltd has provided an update on its ongoing on-market share buy-back program, confirming that a total of 14,430,394 ordinary fully paid shares had been repurchased before the latest reporting day. The company also disclosed that it bought back an additional 15,613 shares on the previous day, as part of its regularly reported daily buy-back activity.

The updated notification, dated 8 April 2026, follows the original buy-back announcement made on 1 November 2024 and the most recent prior update on 7 April 2026. The continuing on-market buy-back indicates EarlyPay’s active capital management strategy, which may support earnings per share and signal management’s confidence in the company’s valuation to existing and prospective shareholders.
